allow: PowerShell(py -c "from anthropic import Anthropic; import os; from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv\(\); client = Anthropic\(api_key=os.getenv\('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'\)\); response = client.messages.create\(model='claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022', max_tokens=10, messages=[{'role': 'user', 'content': 'Hi'}]\); print\('API call successful!'\); print\('Response:', response.content[0].text\)")
